title: Anthropic Files For An IPO: Rapid Reaction — With M.G. Siegler
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and M.G. Siegler discuss Anthropic's IPO filing. They explore why the company is going public before OpenAI, assess Claude's current capabilities, and question whether Anthropic needs additional capital.
